project_info.name: AquaNexus
project_info.aesthetic: Aquatic, cozy, minimal, soft gradients, glassmorphism, subtle water/ripple feel. NO cartoon fish or doodles.

buttons.primary: Teal/Mint gradient or solid teal background, fully rounded (radius_full), white bold text, soft glass shadow.
buttons.secondary: Glassmorphic background (rgba white), teal border, teal text.

cards.dashboard_card: White or Glass surface, radius_lg (20px), internal padding 20px, card shadow. Left-aligned content.
cards.product_card: Vertical stack, image top (radius_md), details bottom. Reorder button small.

inputs.text_input: React Native Paper TextInput. Outlined mode. Outline color teal-200. Background white or soft transparent. Rounded radius_md (12px).

navigation.drawer: Left collapsible. Background: Soft water gradient (mint to pale blue). Active item: Solid white with teal text. Inactive item: Dark slate text.

Auth.layout: Centered content, soft gradient background. Logo top, glassmorphic card for form.
elements: Sign In: Email, Password inputs. Primary CTA 'Sign In'.
Sign Up: Name, Email, Password inputs. Primary CTA 'Create Account'.
Switch link: 'Don't have an account? Sign Up'

Main_Layout.layout: React Navigation Drawer. Custom DrawerContent mapping to app sections.

elements: Temperature Card: Icon (thermometer), 24°C, subtle red/green indicator.
pH Level Card: Icon (water drop), 7.2 pH, optional wave graphic.
Food Level Card: Icon (fish), 85%, progress bar.

AI_Interface.layout: Chat interface. Floating header. Bottom fixed input area.
elements: User Bubble: Pastel Blue, aligned right, radius_md but bottom-right flat.
AI Bubble: Soft Mint/White, aligned left, radius_md but bottom-left flat.
Input: 'Ask anything about your aquarium...', glassmorphic field, send icon.

Camera.layout: Full screen camera view (mock or real Expo Camera). Overlay UI.
elements: Bounding Box: Teal dashed border, transparent center.
Label: 'Fish Type: Goldfish' floating near box, white text on dark glass pill.
Capture Button: Large circular, mint outer ring, white inner circle.

Products.layout: Grid (2 columns) or List layout. Top filter chips.
elements: Product items: Filter, Glass, Driftwood, Fish Food, Dispensers, Sensors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native Expo with TypeScript.
Implement React Navigation Drawer for the Main Layout.
Use React Native Paper for core components but heavily style them using the tokens above to achieve the 'glassmorphic' and 'soft pastel' look.
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='login-button').
Do not use cartoon fish or doodles. Stick to minimal, aquatic gradients and clean UI. Emphasize organic/water archetypes.
Mock Auth state and data using Zustand.
Use the provided image_urls for the product list mock data. Do not use placeholder images like via.placeholder.com.
